Just now

Explore how Angular’s xlatest AI initiatives, developer tools, and intelligent workflows are changing the way modern web applications are built.
Artificial Intelligence is no longer limited to chatbots or recommendation engines. It has become a valuable companion throughout the software development lifecycle, helping developers write better code, automate repetitive tasks, and build intelligent user experiences. Angular, one of the most popular frontend frameworks, is embracing this transformation in a practical and developer-friendly way.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Source : Internet ChatGptIf Not a Member READ FROM HERE
Over the last year, Angular has introduced several AI-focused improvements that go beyond simply integrating an API. The framework is evolving to support AI-assisted development while making it easier to build applications powered by Large Language Models (LLMs).
If you’re an Angular developer, now is a great time to understand where the framework is heading and how AI can become part of your daily workflow.
AI Is Becoming Part of Angular’s Ecosystem
